title: Retry behavior
implementation_summary: Added control-plane Hermes Validation retry behavior policy, retry attempt refs, retry schedule refs, retry dedupe refs, retry backoff refs, retry receipt fields, result fields, prechecker, getter, and result validator.
The S18 precheck consumes the S17 rollback behavior result and emits a frozen synthetic metadata-only retry behavior receipt.

The boundary records retry attempt policy, backoff schedule, dedupe, retry window, recovery path, and incident traceability metadata without enqueueing retry work, executing retry work, writing retry queues, writing retry attempt records, persisting retry schedules, starting retry timers, dispatching retry workers, executing rollback, executing compensation, notifying operators or customers, writing incident traces, appending observability events, or writing runtime/product state.
The S18 result keeps RP00.P02.M03 open and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S19 Unit test: happy path.
